title: GrowGeneration Reports Second Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: GrowGeneration Q2 2024 Financial Results. Revenue: $53.5 million, up 11.8% sequentially from Q1. Down 16.3% year-over-year. Gross Margin: 26.9%, up 110 basis points from Q1. Proprietary Brand: 21.5% penetration, up from 16.7% year-over-year. Net Loss: $5.9 million ($0.10 per share). Adjusted EBITDA: Loss of $1.1 million. Restructuring: 19 stores slated for closure in 2024. Management executing on plan. 2024 Guidance: Revised to $190-195 million revenue. Cost reductions targeting $12 million annually. Strategic shift underway toward B2B focus.
